query: I want to grab food during halftime, what's the best option?

route.summary: Seat → Concourse South → Food Court Beta
steps: Exit your row to the right aisle
Head south along Concourse South corridor
Pass Restroom Block 3 on your left
Food Court Beta is 40m ahead on the right

wait_time.recommendation: Food Court Beta has 40% shorter queue than Alpha right now
wait_time.best_time_to_visit: Visit within the next 2 minutes before halftime rush peaks

crowd_level.alert: ⚠️ Food Court Alpha approaching capacity — consider alternatives

recommendation.primary: 🍔 Head to Food Court Beta via the South Concourse — it's 40% less crowded than Alpha right now!
recommendation.secondary: 💡 Pro tip: Order ahead at the self-service kiosk to skip the counter queue entirely.
